title: Agent Middleware Pipeline
activity_flow: START: Agent::prompt(string $prompt) called on agent instance
[if agent is faked] prepend fake-recording middleware (Ai::recordPrompt)
[if agent uses RemembersConversations AND has conversationParticipant] append RememberConversation middleware
[if agent implements HasMiddleware] append agent->middleware() array
Pipeline executes each middleware in order calling handle(AgentPrompt, Closure $next)
[YES - short-circuit path]: middleware returns AgentResponse directly WITHOUT calling $next($prompt)
[NO - passthrough path]: middleware calls $next($prompt) and returns result
→ Next middleware in chain is invoked
Collect messages: agent->messages() + new UserMessage(prompt, attachments)
textGateway()->generateText(provider, model, instructions, messages, tools, schema, options, timeout)
[else] return AgentResponse with messages, toolCalls, toolResults, steps
Note: AgentPrompted always fires even on short-circuit, receiving the original prompt

middleware_contract.passthrough: return $next($prompt) — forwards to next middleware or terminal
middleware_contract.short_circuit: return new AgentResponse(...) — bypasses terminal, pipeline, and AI gateway

RememberConversation.trigger: agent uses RemembersConversations trait AND hasConversationParticipant()
RememberConversation.behavior: calls $next($prompt)->then(...) to store conversation, user message, assistant message post-response

fake_pending_dispatch.purpose: No-op stub for queue dispatch in fake/test mode. All fluent methods (onConnection, onQueue, delay, chain, etc.) return $this without action. __destruct() is empty (prevents real dispatch).

key_classes: AnonymousAgent implements Agent, Conversational, HasTools — uses Promptable
AssistantAgent implements Agent, HasMiddleware — uses Promptable; withMiddleware(array) sets middleware array
Promptable (trait) — prompt(), stream(), queue(), broadcast(), withModelFailover()
GeneratesText (trait on Provider) — prompt(AgentPrompt), gatherMiddlewareFor(), listenForToolInvocations()
RememberConversation — handle(AgentPrompt, Closure $next): stores conversation and messages post-response
FakePendingDispatch extends PendingDispatch — no-op for test queue dispatch
MakeAgentMiddlewareCommand extends GeneratorCommand — artisan scaffold command
AgentPrompt — value object: agent, prompt string, attachments, provider, model, timeout
AgentResponse — value object: invocationId, text, usage, meta, messages, toolCalls, steps
key_decisions: Does middleware call $next()? → YES: passthrough; NO: short-circuit
Is agent faked? → prepend fake-recording middleware
Does agent use RemembersConversations + have participant? → prepend RememberConversation
Does agent implement HasMiddleware? → append agent-defined middleware
Does agent implement HasStructuredOutput? → return StructuredAgentResponse vs AgentResponse
Is queue() called while faked? → return FakePendingDispatch instead of real dispatch
important_notes: AgentPrompted event always fires after pipeline (even on short-circuit), receiving processedPrompt ?? originalPrompt. Middleware stack order: [fake-recording?] → [RememberConversation?] → [agent custom middleware...]. pipeline() returns a new Illuminate Pipeline backed by the IoC container.
